description: CompositionFresh blue round neck jersey made of 100% PES, with adidas patent 3-Stripes running down the shouldersFittingRegularWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoWith this Climacool enabled performance jersey, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be: on the finish line. A combination of performance fabrics, open mesh and ventilation channels to keep cool air flowing in and heat and sweat flowing out, you can stay dry and comfortable, performing at your peak in even the most heated competition. On an off day, pair it with denims and cool sneakers to look your casual best.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in jerseysHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
